uk: Неділя 18-та по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 1. Єв. 7.
Св. мученика Калістрата і тих, що з ним
Преподобного отця нашого Ніла, основника й ігумена монастиря Гроттаферратського
saints.en: 17th Sunday after Pentecost. St. Martyr Callistratus and those with him. Ven. Nilus, Founder and Hegumen of the Monastery of Grottaferrata

rubrics:
Вечірня: «Блажен муж». На «Господи, взиваю» 10 стихир: 4 Октоїха, 3 мч., 3 прп., Слава: мч., І нині: богородичний-догмат 1-го гласу. Вхід. Прокімен дня. Стиховня воскресна. Тропар воскпесний та тропар мч., Слава: тропар прп., І нині: богород. недільний за голосом другого. Відпуст великий з помин. служби недільної, першого і другого святого.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар воскресний і мч., Слава: тропар прп., І нині: богород. з недільних, за гласом тропаря прп. Катизми чергові і сідальні воскресні. Полієлей. «Ангельський собор». Степенна, іпакой і прокімен 1-го гласу. Єв. – Ів. 63 зач.; 20, 1-10. Псалом 50. Канон воскресний, Богородиці, мч. і прп. Катавасія: «Відкрию уста мої». По 3-ій пісні – кондак-ікос і сідальний мч. і прп. По 6-ій – кондак-ікос воскресні. На 9-ій – «Чеснішу», по 9-ій – «Свят Господь Бог наш», недільний світильний та мч., Слава: прп., І нині: богород. недільного світильного. Хвалитних стихир – 8, недільних. Слава: стихира євангельська, І нині: «Преблагословенна». По славослов'ї – тропар недільний «Сьогодні спасіння світу». Відпуст великий з помин. недільним мч. і прп.
Часи: на всіх часах: тропар воскресний, Слава: на 3-му - мч., на 6-му - храму: на 9-му – прп. Конадаки: на 1-му – воскресний, на 3-му – мч, на 6-му - храму і на 9-му – прп.
Літургія: антифони: два перших – воскресні, а третій – звичайний з воскресним приспівом, а також і «Прийдіте, поклонімся». Тропар воскресний, Сл.: кондак воскрес., І нині: богород. з неділ. за гласом Сл. Прокімен і алилуя воскресні. Ряд.: Ап. – 2 Кор. 188 зач.; 9, 6-11. Єв. – Лк. 17 зач.; 5, 1-11. Причасний «Хваліте».

troparion_en.text: In contest you were strengthened by the Holy Spirit, Martyr Callistratus, / and were glorious in casting down the Enemy. / You offered a noble army of athletes / as sweet-smelling incense to Christ. / With them pray for us who praise you with hymns.

kontakion_en.text: (Podoben: “Today You have shown forth...”)Like stars you have shone upon the world / shedding the light of your contests and miracles upon all who cry to you: / “Rejoice, Martyr Callistratus and fellow company of martyrs.”

troparion.text: In contest you were strengthened by the Holy Spirit, Martyr Callistratus, / and were glorious in casting down the Enemy. / You offered a noble army of athletes / as sweet-smelling incense to Christ. / With them pray for us who praise you with hymns.

kontakion.text: (Podoben: “Today You have shown forth...”)Like stars you have shone upon the world / shedding the light of your contests and miracles upon all who cry to you: / “Rejoice, Martyr Callistratus and fellow company of martyrs.”

troparion.text: You abandoned the world and fought the good fight / by hardship, vigil and prayer. / Pray to Christ our God to save our souls, O holy Father Sabbatius!

kontakion.text: Fleeing the turmoil of life / you dwelt on an island in the sea. / You took up your cross and followed Christ / toiling in vigils, fasting and hardships. / You became the adornment of the righteous / And we lovingly celebrate your memory. / Pray to Christ our God / to save our souls, O righteous Sabbatius!

troparion.text: Holy Apostle Mark, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.
Holy Apostle Aristarchus, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.
Holy Apostle Zenas, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.

Your Martyr Epίkharis, O Lord, /  through her contest received an incorruptible crown from You, our God; /  for, possessed of Your strength, /  she laid low the tyrants and shattered the powerless boldness of the demons.  / By her supplications, save our souls.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You shone forth in your splendor as a bright star,  /  announcing Christ to this temporal world, O Martyr Epίkharis, /   vanquishing the snares of false gods, /   you revealed the true light to the faithful,  /  and you always intercede on behalf of us all.

oca_saints.name: Saint Ignatius of Christ the Savior Monastery

troparion.text: In you, O Father, was preserved with exactness what was according to the image;  /  for you took up the Cross and followed Christ.  / By so doing, you taught us to disregard the flesh, for it passes away;  /  but to care for the soul, since it is immortal. / Therefore, O Venerable Ignatius, your spirit rejoices with the Angels.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...&rdqo;)
Having divinely armed yourself with purity of soul  / and firmly grasping unceasing prayer as a spear, you have slain the armies of the demons.  /  Therefore, we beseech you, O Father Ignatius:  / “Always intercede for those who honor you.”

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Flavian, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

(Podoben: “O coeternal Word...”)
Let us praise the devout Aquilina,  / who was seen as a godly-minded girl and a champion of Christ,  / who courageously maintained her faith out of love for Him / , and overcoming the Enemy by her holy struggles, she obtained divine glory.  / Now she intercedes with Christ the Word to have mercy on our souls.

By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, /  you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, / you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, / you defended the Faith, even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Anthimus entreat Christ God to save our souls.
